headline: Bill Ackman to create the next-gen Berkshire Hathaway
summary: Pershing Square Holdings (PSHZF) CEO Bill Ackman joins Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi from the NYSE to discuss his bid to build the next-generation Berkshire Hathaway (BRK-A) following his dual IPO on Wednesday.

headline: Arch Capital Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Premiums Fall Y/Y
summary: ACGL's Q1 earnings beat estimates as underwriting income jumps and investment income rises, offsetting lower premiums and a decline in revenues.
